notes: Refreshes Tater's Picks with a new left-facing mascot made especially for recommending movies and series.
Reads the highlighted pick's summary using the voice and TTS provider configured in the paired Tater Core.
Stops narration immediately while moving through the list, then starts the newly highlighted summary after a short pause.
Adds a Tater's Picks Narration module setting so spoken recommendations can be turned on or off.
